span.p:
Idle
breathing voice orb, screen kept awake

span.p:
Checking phone
wait up to 10 s for the paired link

span.p:
Recording
on-device VAD ends the turn, no button-up needed

span.p:
Processing
relayed to the agent, screen may dim

Playing
orb reacts to Sky's speech
